languages.text: "Капитан-интендант Дунавски — правая рука полковника. Руководит снабжением, так что, получается, мой непосредственный командир. Она хорошая женщина, правда немного... ну... того". {n}Янур делает неопределенное движение рукой около головы.{/n} "Верит, что вы вот прилетели и сразу жизнь наша поменяется, наладится и к звездам полетим с вами. Искупление получим, из посуды есть начнем. Раньше-то вообще комиссарской брехней отдавало, а сейчас... Не знаю. Мне дядькина мудрость ближе будет".

"Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski is the colonel's right hand. She's in charge of supplies, which makes her my immediate commander. She is a good sort, just a little bit... well... out there." {n}Janur makes a vague gesture near his head.{/n} "She believes that, now you've arrived, our lives will change overnight. Everything will get sorted and we'll head for the stars with you. That we'll get our atonement, even start eating off real plates. It used to sound like Commissar claptrap, but now... I don't know. I'd rather stick to my uncle's ways."
languages.original_text: "Капитан-интендант Дунавски — правая рука полковника. Руководит снабжением, так что, получается, мой непосредственный командир. Она хорошая женщина, правда немного... ну... того". {n}Янур делает неопределенное движение рукой около головы.{/n} "Верит, что вы вот прилетели и сразу жизнь наша поменяется, наладится и к звездам полетим с вами. Everything will get sorted, and we'll head for the stars with you. That we'll get our atonement, start eating off real plates. It used to sound like commissar claptrap, but now... I don't know. I'd rather stick to my uncle's ways."

"Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski is the colonel's right hand. She's in charge of supplies, which makes her my immediate commander. She is a good sort, just a little bit... well... out there." {n}Janur makes a vague gesture near his head.{/n} "She believes that, now you've arrived, our lives will change overnight. Everything will get sorted and we'll head for the stars with you. That we'll get our atonement, even start eating off real plates. It used to sound like commissar claptrap, but now... I don't know. I'd rather stick to my uncle's ways."

"Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski is the colonel's right-hand man. She's in charge of Tsar-Cage and supplies. I don't know how things work up where you're from, but supply is the most important duty in the regiment. Dunawski's a good person, but a bit naive — like the rest of them who think the Imperium'll come, forgive us for the sins of our ancestors, supply us with everything we need, and bring us back to His light with honours." {n}Janur keeps his tone light, but there is no disguising the fact that when he talks about the Imperium coming, he means you just as much as any hypothetical scenario.{/n}

languages.text: 「大佐の右腕はクォーターマスタ・ダナウスキー。彼女はツァー・ケージと物資の管理をしている。君たちの出身地ではどうなっているのか知らないが、物資は連隊で最も重要な任務だ。ダナウスキーは良い人だが、少し無邪気だ。帝国が来るだろうと、祖先の罪を許して、必要なものをすべて供給し、栄誉をもって彼のもとに導いてくれるだろうと、他の連隊員も思っている。」{n}ジャヌールは軽い口調を保っているが、帝国が来るという話で、彼は君を想定していることを隠せない。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski is the colonel's right-hand man. She's in charge of Tsar-Cage and supplies. I don't know how things work up where you're from, but supply is the most important duty in the regiment. Dunawski's a good person, but a bit naive — like the rest of them who think the Imperium'll come, forgive us for the sins of our ancestors, supply us with everything we need, and bring us back to His light with honours." {n}Janur keeps his tone light, but there is no disguising the fact that when he talks about the Imperium coming, he means you just as much as any hypothetical scenario.{/n}

languages.text: "Levazımcı Yüzbaşı Dunawski, Albay'ın sağ koludur. İkmalden sorumludur, bu da onu doğrudan üstüm yapar. İyi biridir, sadece biraz... Aklı havadadır." {n}Janur, kafasının yanında belirsiz bir hareket yapıyor.{/n} "O, siz geldiğinize göre hayatlarımızın bir gecede değişeceğine inanıyor. Her şeyin yoluna gireceğine ve sizinle yıldızlara doğru yola çıkacağımıza. Kefaretimizi vereceğimize, hatta gerçek tabaklardan yemeye başlayacağımıza. Eskiden komiser zırvası gibi gelirdi ama şimdi... Bilmiyorum. Amcamın yöntemlerine bağlı kalmayı tercih ederim."
languages.original_text: "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski is the colonel's right hand. She's in charge of supplies, which makes her my immediate commander. She is a good sort, just a little bit... well... out there." {n}Janur makes a vague gesture near his head.{/n} "She believes that, now you've arrived, our lives will change overnight. Everything will get sorted and we'll head for the stars with you. That we'll get our atonement, even start eating off real plates. It used to sound like commissar claptrap, but now... I don't know. I'd rather stick to my uncle's ways."

Aklı havadadır." {n}Janur, kafasının yanında belirsiz bir hareket yapıyor.{/n} "O, siz geldiğinize göre hayatlarımızın bir gecede değişeceğine inanıyor. Her şeyin yoluna gireceğine ve sizinle yıldızlara doğru yola çıkacağımıza. Kefaretimizi vereceğimize, hatta gerçek tabaklardan yemeye başlayacağımıza. Eskiden komiser zırvası gibi gelirdi ama şimdi... Bilmiyorum. Amcamın yöntemlerine bağlı kalmayı tercih ederim."

languages.text: “军需官上尉杜纳芙斯卡是上校的左膀右臂。她主管补给，因此是我的直属指挥官。她人是挺不错，就是有点……呃……不太正常。”{n}雅努尔在自己脑袋旁边含糊地比划了一下。{/n}“她相信，既然您来了，我们的日子马上就会翻天覆地。什么问题都能解决，我们还会追随您前往星辰。我们会得到救赎，甚至还能用真正的盘子吃饭。这搁以前，听着就像是政委式的空话，可现在……我说不准了。我还是宁可坚持我叔叔的那条路。”
languages.original_text: "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski is the colonel's right hand. She's in charge of supplies, which makes her my immediate commander. She is a good sort, just a little bit... well... out there." {n}Janur makes a vague gesture near his head.{/n} "She believes that, now you've arrived, our lives will change overnight. Everything will get sorted and we'll head for the stars with you. That we'll get our atonement, even start eating off real plates. It used to sound like commissar claptrap, but now... I don't know. I'd rather stick to my uncle's ways."

traits.locale_text: “军需官上尉杜纳芙斯卡是上校的左膀右臂。她主管补给，因此是我的直属指挥官。她人是挺不错，就是有点……呃……不太正常。”{n}雅努尔在自己脑袋旁边含糊地比划了一下。{/n}“她相信，既然您来了，我们的日子马上就会翻天覆地。什么问题都能解决，我们还会追随您前往星辰。我们会得到救赎，甚至还能用真正的盘子吃饭。这搁以前，听着就像是政委式的空话，可现在……我说不准了。我还是宁可坚持我叔叔的那条路。”

languages.text: "Captain-Quartiermeisterin Dunawski ist die rechte Hand des Colonels. Sie ist für den Nachschub verantwortlich und damit meine direkte Vorgesetzte. Sie ist nett, nur ein bisschen .. na ja ... ungewöhnlich." {n}Janur macht eine vage Geste an seinem Kopf.{/n} "Sie glaubt, dass sich unser Leben mit Eurer Ankunft über Nacht ändern wird. Alles kommt ins Lot und wir reisen mit Euch zu den Sternen. Wir bekommen unsere Sühne und essen sogar von richtigen Tellern. Früher klang das nach Kommissarsgerede, aber jetzt ... Ich weiß nicht. Ich halte mich lieber an meinen Onkel."
languages.original_text: "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski is the colonel's right hand. She's in charge of supplies, which makes her my immediate commander. She is a good sort, just a little bit... well... out there." {n}Janur makes a vague gesture near his head.{/n} "She believes that, now you've arrived, our lives will change overnight. Everything will get sorted and we'll head for the stars with you. That we'll get our atonement, even start eating off real plates. It used to sound like Commissar claptrap, but now... I don't know. I'd rather stick to my uncle's ways."

Sie ist nett, nur ein bisschen .. na ja ... ungewöhnlich. {n}Janur macht eine vage Geste an seinem Kopf.{/n} "Sie glaubt, dass sich unser Leben mit Eurer Ankunft über Nacht ändern wird. Alles kommt ins Lot und wir reisen mit Euch zu den Sternen. Wir bekommen unsere Sühne und essen sogar von richtigen Tellern. Früher klang das nach Kommissarsgerede, aber jetzt ... Ich weiß nicht. Ich halte mich lieber an meinen Onkel."

languages.text: « La capitaine-quartier-maître Dunawski est le bras droit du colonel. Elle est responsable du ravitaillement, ce qui fait d'elle ma commandante immédiate. Elle a bon fond, mais elle est un peu... spéciale, disons, {n}explique-t-il en faisant un geste vague près de sa tête.{/n} Maintenant que vous êtes là, elle croit que nos vies vont changer du jour au lendemain. Que tout va s'arranger et que vous allez nous emmener dans les étoiles, qu'on aura notre expiation et qu'on pourra même manger dans de vraies assiettes. Ça ressemblait à des boniments de commissaire, au début, mais maintenant... Ah, je ne sais pas. Je préfère m'en tenir aux méthodes de mon oncle. »
languages.original_text: "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski is the colonel's right hand. She's in charge of supplies, which makes her my immediate commander. She is a good sort, just a little bit... well... out there." {n}Janur makes a vague gesture near his head.{/n} "She believes that, now you've arrived, our lives will change overnight. Elle a bon fond, mais elle est un peu... spéciale, disons, {n}explique-t-il en faisant un geste vague près de sa tête.{/n} Maintenant que vous êtes là, elle croit que nos vies vont changer du jour au lendemain. Que tout va s'arranger et que vous allez nous emmener dans les étoiles, qu'on aura notre expiation et qu'on pourra même manger dans de vraies assiettes. Ça ressemblait à des boniments de commissaire, au début, mais maintenant... Ah, je ne sais pas. Je préfère m'en tenir aux méthodes de mon oncle. »

languages.text: «La capitana intendente Dunawski es la mano derecha del coronel. Está a cargo de los suministros, por lo que es mi superior inmediata. Es buena, pero un poco... bueno... excéntrica». {n}Janur hace un gesto vago junto a su cabeza.{/n} «Cree que, ahora que ha llegado usted, nuestras vidas van a cambiar de la noche a la mañana. Que todo se solucionará e iremos a las estrellas a su lado. Que recibiremos nuestra expiación y empezaremos a comer en platos de verdad. Antes parecían chorradas de Comisario, pero ahora... No lo sé. Prefiero seguir el camino de mi tío».
languages.original_text: "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski is the colonel's right hand. She's in charge of supplies, which makes her my immediate commander. She is a good sort, just a little bit... well... out there." {n}Janur makes a vague gesture near his head.{/n} "She believes that, now you've arrived, our lives will change overnight. Prefiero seguir el camino de mi tío».
